data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for graceful degradation when the agent is confused.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate a specific scenario regarding graceful degradation when the agent is confused. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API interactions or outcomes that demonstrate this behavior. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address this scenario directly, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of graceful degradation when the agent is confused.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for graceful degradation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the graceful degradation behavior.
